hero.name: Younes Aid
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer passionate about creating amazing digital experiences and UI/UX designer.

aboutme.title: About Me
aboutme.description: A passionate Full-Stack Developer, Mobile Engineer, and UI/UX Designer with 2+ years of experience. I bridge the gap between intuitive design and robust back-end architecture to build scalable, high-performance applications. I thrive on solving complex problems, developing intelligent solutions, and actively contributing to the open-source tech community.

webDevelopment.title: Web Development
webDevelopment.description: Modern websites using React, Next.js, Tailwind, and backend APIs.

mobileDevelopment.title: Mobile App Development
mobileDevelopment.description: Android apps built with Kotlin or Java.

uiuxDesign.title: UI/UX Design
uiuxDesign.description: Beautiful and functional interfaces designed with user experience in mind.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm always interested in new opportunities and exciting projects. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out!
